description_long: This chest of drawers features a tall, narrow silhouette with a gently curved front and sides, giving it an elegant, classic appearance. The front face is fitted with five evenly spaced drawers, each with a small, round knob handle for easy access. The legs are slender and slightly splayed, adding to the refined look and providing stability. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body, suitable for placing small items or decor. The entire piece appears to be constructed from wood, finished in a uniform, dark gray color. There are no visible decorative carvings, inlays, or branding, emphasizing a minimalist yet sophisticated design.
description: A tall, narrow chest of drawers with five curved-front drawers, round knob handles, and slender splayed legs, finished in dark gray wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with round knob handles and the curved front profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle curve of the side panels and the overhanging top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous curved back with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the gentle side curvature and showing the profile of the legs.
